title: taraxacum vulpinum
intro: Taraxacum vulpinum, also known as the wolf's bane dandelion or dog's dandelion, is a perennial plant species within the dandelion genus, characterized by its jagged leaves and yellow flowers. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include its anti-inflammatory and diuretic effects, making it beneficial in treating digestive issues, kidney stones, and skin conditions. The health benefits of Taraxacum vulpinum include its ability to lower blood pressure, reduce inflammation, and improve digestion, as well as its potential to act as a natural diuretic. Taraxacum vulpinum can be prepared into various herbal remedies, such as teas, tinctures, and infusions, and is also used in traditional medicine to support liver and kidney function.
